phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get city maps
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo conseguir un mapa de la ciudad?
phrases.pronunciation: BWAY-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-day PWAY-doh kohn-seh-GWEER oon MAH-pah day lah see-oo-DAHD?

likely_response.local: En el mostrador de la izquierda, gratis.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah GRAH-tees
likely_response.translation_en: At the counter on the left, free.

responses.english: At the counter on the left, free.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah GRAH-tees
responses.local: En el mostrador de la izquierda, gratis.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where accessible tourism information is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde hay información sobre turismo accesible?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-as, DON-deh eye in-for-mah-SYOHN SOH-breh too-RIS-moh ak-seh-SEE-bleh?

likely_response.local: En la mesa del fondo, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH MEH-sah DEHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back table, on the right.

responses.english: At the back table, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH MEH-sah DEHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: En la mesa del fondo, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to book a guided walking tour
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo reservo una visita guiada a pie?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KOH-moh rreh-SER-voh oo-nah bee-SEE-tah ghee-AH-dah ah PYEH?

likely_response.local: Rellene este formulario y pague en la caja.
likely_response.pronunciation: rehl-LEH-neh EH-steh fohr-moo-lah-REE-oh Y pah-G-eh EHN LAH KAH-hah
likely_response.translation_en: Fill out this form and pay at the register.

responses.english: Fill out this form and pay at the register.
responses.phonetic: rehl-LEH-neh EH-steh fohr-moo-lah-REE-oh Y pah-G-eh EHN LAH KAH-hah
responses.local: Rellene este formulario y pague en la caja.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if Cantabria regional passes are in stock
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿tienen pases regionales de Cantabria disponibles?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, TYEH-nen PAH-sehs rreh-hyoh-NAH-les deh Kahn-TAH-bryah dee-poh-NEE-bles?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there is enough stock for now.

responses.english: Yes, there is enough stock for now.
